name: Phase 0 GTM Foundation
objective: Go-to-market foundation that gates paid launch for Signal API and Agent Auth API. Landing page + waitlist, competitor scan, pricing validation interviews, first-10-customers plan, and compliance memo. Half agent-delegatable (E.01, E.03), half user-driven (E.02, E.04, E.05).
exit_criteria: Landing page live with waitlist capture (E.01)
Compliance memo drafted + external review complete (E.05 — user-driven + external)
gate: C.12 (Signal API compliance gate) blocks on E.02 + E.05. Paid launch blocks on all of Track E plus Tracks A-D.
